text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O and I have been hard at work during Tracen
Academy's summer camp, and we've finally reached the last day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... What a beautiful day! I can feel the sun's energy pouring into
me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get down to business!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As the model of punctuality, I never waste time! Not even a
millisecond!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I just can't wait for tonight! ♪ It's been so long since I've been to a
festival. Do you think they'll have candy apples?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
They should, right? Although I prefer candied fruit slices myself! You
can eat them in just one bite.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A festival, eh... I had no idea.
choice_data_list: Would you like to go after training?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I was just about to suggest the same thing! Hehe, we're on the same
wavelength!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's decided! We're going to a festival after this! Let this be
extra motivation for today's training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once we finish our day of training on the beach, Sakura Bakushin O
and I head back to prepare for the festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Is everyone going to the festival? Uh... it might be a bit
crowded.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
A bit? Now that's an understatement... We better stick together.
Don't want to get lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing all the Umamusume getting ready to go to the festival, I start
to get nervous. What if I lose Sakura Bakushin O in the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Apologies for the wait, Trainer! I'm all ready to go!
choice_data_list:
Before that, I need you to promise me
something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay, what is it?
choice_data_list: Do your best not to get lost, okay?
Do your best not to get lost, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Of course! As class representative, safety is always my top priority!
choice_data_list: If you get lost, call me.
If you get lost, call me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Right, communication is an important tool for anyone, but especially
the class representative! Leave it to me!
choice_data_list: Do you even have your cell phone?
Do you even have your cell phone?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yup, I have it in my bag—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: AHHH! My bag! I almost forgot it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: D-don't worry! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O's absentmindedness does not inspire confidence...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Look at all these stalls! The food! The festival dance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This brings back so many memories... My parents were always so
impressed by my skills in the shooting and fishing games.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, this is sooo exciting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That does it, we're visiting ALL the stalls! Let's start over there!
Ready, set...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My efforts to stop her are in vain, and before I know it, she
disappears into the crowd...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the festival venue as crowded as it is, I soon lose track of Sakura
Bakushin O completely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As planned, I try calling her cell phone, but all I hear is an automated
message saying she can't be reached... I should find the organizers
and—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: TRAAAIIINEEEERRR!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Can you hear me?! I'm over here, Trainer! Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I whip my head around at the sound of Bakushin O's voice. All I see is
more people, but I head in the direction of her calls.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hello, hello?! Trainer, answer me! Trai—wait, why's my screen black?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Traaaiiineeerrr! Where are youuuu?! My cell phone isn't working!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A black screen... Judging by the fact that I haven't received any calls,
that can only mean one thing...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, now that you mention it, it's off! Wait—Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness you found me! I thought I'd lost you for good!
choice_data_list: So you did try to call me...
So you did try to call me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Of course I did!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The class representative always keeps her promises!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I trust you, Trainer! I know you only have my best interests at
heart!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Just like I always keep my fellow students in mind!
choice_data_list: I'm just glad we found each other.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Agreed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Considering the crowd, I was worried you might have been hurt!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But it seems that didn't happen... to either of us!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And now, we have been reunited! And it feels so good!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'd say we're a winning combination if there ever was one! I can't wait
to see where we go in the future! Here's to us, Trainer! Put 'er there!
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I shake Sakura Bakushin O's hand as the festival music plays on. We
still have room to grow, but I can't wait to see what this so-called
"winning combination" can do.
